ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., RCSumPool, Siamese) */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Seed used for random number generation */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used during training */,
  "early_stopping_metric" TEXT /* Early stopping metric used for model evaluation */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model for easier identification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "model_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model type was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the model type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "auroc" REAL /* AuROC value of the model */,
  "auprc" REAL /* AuPRC value of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix of the model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user commenting */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the comment is active */,
  "last_edited_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last editor */,
  "last_edited_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the rating is active */,
  "last_edited_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last editor */,
  "last_edited_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ratings_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)
